name: coTfsLssWaitForFastScanRequest
title: coTfsLssWaitForFastScanRequest
syntax: long coTfsLssWaitForFastScanRequest( dword[] pId, byte[] pBitCheck, byte[] pSub, byte[] pNext );
description: This function waits for the Fast Scan message.

parameters.name: pBitCheck
parameters.description: FastScan bitcheck value, used to define the used bitmask for LSS FastScan.

parameters.name: pSub
parameters.description: FastScan sub, defines which part of the LSS-ID is transmitted in idNumber. 0 - vendor-ID1 - product code2 - revision number3 - serial number

parameters.name: pNext
parameters.description: FastScan next, specifies the sub for the next request.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
